metadata.title: Accounting | Adon ERP
metadata.description: AI-powered accounting platform for all your financial operations — from reconciliation and expenses to tax returns and real-time reporting.

hero.title: Accounting made effortlessly simple
hero.description: AI-native accounting platform for all your financial operations — from reconciliation and expenses to tax returns and real-time reporting. Fast, complete, and simple.

performance.title: Unlock true performance
performance.description: Speed matters. All operations are processed in less than 90 milliseconds, faster than the blink of an eye. It helps accountants do much more in less time.

automation.title: Just automation
automation.description: Experience zero data entry. Our advanced AI-powered invoice data capture has a 98% recognition rate. All you have to do is to validate the invoice.

mobile.title: Your finances in your pocket
mobile.description: Take pictures of your expenses, and let the Artificial Intelligence do the rest. Snap, scan, and sync — all from your phone.

bankReconciliation.title: Smart bank reconciliation
bankReconciliation.description: Never import bank statements manually again. Adon ERP integrates with 28,000+ banks from all around the world with smart AI matching.

expenseCategories.title: All your expenses in one place
expenseCategories.description: Categorize and track every transaction automatically.

features.title: All the features done right.
features.description: Everything you need to manage your business finances in one place.

items.globalTaxDesc: Pre-configured for 180+ countries with local tax rules
items.analyticsDesc: Real-time P&L, balance sheets, and cash flow
items.budgetDesc: Track actuals against budgets in real-time

testimonial.quote: A VAT closing that used to take 4 days is now done in 3 hours with Adon ERP, with a better service for our clients: real-time accounting.
testimonial.name: Wim Van den Brande

cta.title: Unleash your growth potential
cta.description: Join 15 million users who grow their business with Adon ERP. Start your 30-day free trial today.
